name: Cafe Royal Carrot Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim and halve the carrots; do not peel them. Place in a soup pot and add chicken broth to cover.
2. Bring to a boil, then lower the heat and simmer until the carrots are tender, about 40 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, sauté onions and bay leaves in oil until the onion is translucent. Reserve.
4. When the carrots are tender, place them in a blender and discard the bay leaves.
5. Add the onions to the blender. Puree until smooth, adding liquid from the soup pot as needed for consistency.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
